segments.text: So I'm Dr. Tejeswini, calling from Tata AIG Insurance Company.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So can I speak to Lalita ji?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. So which language are you comfortable with? Telugu, Hindi, English?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. So this call is for medical verification, ma'am. Are you free now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. So in this, I will ask some questions about your health and habits. There will also be some verification questions. If you have any health problems or any such habits, please tell me. The answers you provide will be considered as part of your insurance application. If you agree to this, a virtual agreement will be formed between you and Tata AIG Insurance Company.
